report.summary: Built 2 new learn guides — Bitcoin Runes Protocol (fungible tokens on BTC, UTXO mechanics, top tokens, ecosystem) and Farcaster & SocialFi (decentralized social, Frames/Mini Apps, Neynar acquisition, creator economy) — with full SEO optimization, structured data, and FAQ schemas.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Bitcoin Runes: Researched Casey Rodarmor's fungible token protocol — OP_RETURN + UTXO model, ~$96M category market cap, DOG ($80.5M mcap) as top token, 713 BTC 30d trading volume on Magic Eden, explosive April 2024 launch (750K daily txns, 884 BTC miner revenue) followed by significant cooling (<100K daily txns by late 2025), Runes vs BRC-20 vs Ordinals technical comparison, ecosystem tools (Xverse, Magic Eden, Luminex)

Farcaster & SocialFi: Researched leading Web3 social protocol — $240M+ funding, 40-60K current DAU (peaked ~80K), Frames launch triggered 400% DAU spike, Frames v2/Mini Apps with app store, Farcaster Pro $120/yr (10K subs in 6hrs = $1.2M), $25K+/week creator rewards, Neynar acquisition Jan 2026 (~$1B valuation), $180M returned to investors, Farcaster vs Lens Protocol comparison, SocialFi landscape challenges

sections.title: Content Created
items: Learn guide: Bitcoin Runes Guide 2026 (~250 lines) — covers what Runes are, UTXO + OP_RETURN mechanics, Runes vs BRC-20 vs Ordinals comparison table, top 5 Rune tokens (DOG, RSIC, PUPS, MIM, DCNTRL), 6-step how-to-trade guide, ecosystem overview, activity trends from launch to cooling, risks, future outlook, 6-question FAQ

Learn guide: Farcaster & SocialFi Guide 2026 (~260 lines) — covers protocol architecture (Hubs, onchain identity), Frames & Mini Apps deep dive, SocialFi landscape with Farcaster vs Lens comparison table, Neynar acquisition details, monetization model (Pro + creator rewards), 6-step getting started guide, honest challenges assessment, 6-question FAQ

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Bitcoin Runes: Title 'Bitcoin Runes Guide 2026 — How Fungible Tokens Work on BTC | degen0x', OG/Twitter cards, ArticleStructuredData schema, FAQStructuredData with 6 questions, Breadcrumb navigation, 3 internal links (btcfi-bitcoin-defi-guide-2026, bitcoin-layer-2-guide, bitcoin-ordinals-guide), keywords array targeting 'bitcoin runes', 'runes protocol', 'runes vs brc-20'

Farcaster SocialFi: Title 'Farcaster & SocialFi Guide 2026 — Decentralized Social Media on Crypto | degen0x', OG/Twitter cards, ArticleStructuredData schema, FAQStructuredData with 6 questions, Breadcrumb navigation, 3 internal links (ai-crypto-agents-guide, account-abstraction, smart-wallets-guide-2026), keywords targeting 'farcaster', 'socialfi', 'web3 social'
Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in published-pages.ts
